userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
MW id 8 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 0.1000% on fixed leg 50,000,000 Receive USD LIBOR 1Y on floating leg 56,471,050 Expiry 21 jul 2020
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 8 Start date can't be different per leg in Markitwire
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
MW id 8 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 0.1000% on fixed leg 50,000,000 Receive USD LIBOR 1Y on floating leg 56,471,050 Expiry 24 sep 2017
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
